scripts.build:cf: next build && npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build && mv .open-next/worker.js .open-next/_worker.js && cp -r .open-next/assets/* .open-next/ && echo '{"version":1,"include":["/*"],"exclude":["/_next/static/*","/page_media/*"]}' > .open-next/_routes.json
scripts.preview: npm run build:cf && wrangler pages dev .open-next
scripts.deploy: npm run build:cf && wrangler pages deploy .open-next
